message:
feat(agent): use tree-based auto-discovery for delegation resolution

Add agentTree, agentTreeChildren, and agentTreeSelfPath to AgentOptions.
When agentTree is present, the Agent constructor uses resolveAgentDelegates()
instead of the capabilities-based allowlist to determine delegation targets.
executeDelegation now resolves path-based names (e.g. "utility/reader")
from the tree, and passes the tree to subagents with correct selfPath
and children context. Falls back to capabilities when no tree is provided.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
